recommendations.title: Samurai I: Musashi Miyamoto
recommendations.overview: Struggling to elevate himself from his low caste in 17th century Japan, Miyamoto trains to become a mighty samurai warrior.

recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat
recommendations.overview: Washed-up MMA fighter Cole Young, unaware of his heritage, and hunted by Emperor Shang Tsung's best warrior, Sub-Zero, seeks out and trains with Earth's greatest champions as he prepares to stand against the enemies of Outworld in a high stakes battl

recommendations.title: Brotherhood of the Wolf
recommendations.overview: In 18th century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent by the King to the Gevaudan province to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.

recommendations.title: Train Dreams
recommendations.overview: A logger leads a life of quiet grace as he experiences love and loss during an era of monumental change in early 20th-century America.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Mask
recommendations.overview: A former assassin tries to redeem himself by becoming a masked highwayman in Colonial America.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Deadpool
recommendations.overview: A kidnapped Fred Savage is forced to endure Deadpool's PG-13 rendition of Deadpool 2, as a Princess Bride-esque story that's full of magic, wonder, and zero Fs.

recommendations.title: 2012: Ice Age
recommendations.overview: A volcanic eruption in Iceland sends a glacier towards North America, causing everything in it's path to freeze. A family man struggles to escape the onslaught of the coming ice age.

recommendations.title: Pilgrimage
recommendations.overview: In 13th century Ireland a group of monks must escort a sacred relic across a landscape fraught with peril.

recommendations.title: April and the Extraordinary World
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: It's 1941, but France is trapped in the 19th Century, governed by steam and Napoleon V. Avril, a teenage girl, goes in search of her missing scientist parents.

recommendations.title: Case Closed: The Fist of Blue Sapphire
recommendations.overview: The world's greatest blue sapphire, the "blue lapis fist", said to have sunk in a pirate ship in the late 19th century, on the coasts of Singapore. A local millionaire plots to retrieve it, and when it's exhibited in an exhibition at the Singaporean
